name: Chart Grid
description: Responsive grid of chart containers for data visualization dashboards. Charts use their own title prop — no Card wrapping.

default.description: Responsive grid of chart containers for data visualization dashboards. Charts use their own title prop — no Card wrapping.

slots.header: Dashboard section title with _heading4 and time-range Select
slots.charts: Array of Chart({ type }) instances (line, bar, pie, area) using the title prop directly

dashboard.description: Mixed-size chart grid where one chart spans 2 columns for emphasis. Ideal for overview dashboards with a primary and supporting metrics.

slots.header: Dashboard section title with _heading4 and time-range Select
slots.supporting-charts: Smaller Chart instances filling remaining grid cells

single-focus.description: One large chart with full width and a row of mini stats below. Use when a single metric needs deep focus with supporting context.

slots.header: Section title with _heading4 and time-range Select
slots.stats: Horizontal row of mini Statistic cards below the chart

sparkline-row.description: Horizontal row of small sparkline charts for quick trend scanning. Compact visualization for dense dashboards.

slots.cards: Array of sparkline cards, each with a label, value, and Sparkline chart

slots.header: Dashboard section title with _heading4 and time-range Select
slots.charts: Array of Chart({ type }) instances (line, bar, pie, area) using the title prop directly
